reviews.review_description: It has a lot of potential but I cannot recommend this game and the current state that it is. It's still under heavy development some of these simple maps give me early second life vibes for some reason but I highly recommend to keep tabs on this game and wait for them to update it more

There isn’t a game like this out there in VR. I love the multiple options you can do in the game. I love doing the quests but being able to buy property and creating buildings is great. Building designs are beautiful and there are so many ways to design each property. I recommend this game.

I play as often as other games I play, hoping the new art comes soon. 

Driving the cars is my favorite! Please upgrade land features soon!

I recently tried the game, and gotta say it has a lot of potential. The world is massive, like REALLY massive! I think only the size of TES II: Daggerfall stands remotely close to that. The environment at first may look barren, but there are so many cities, towns and villages you can populate with buildings and just play the way you want to. At first, I was pulled back by the retro graphics, but the devs said they’re gonna improve them, so I keep my fingers crossed! Good job, guys, and keep up the great work.

This is a great start to a game that looks like it has a lot to offer and more to come! A lot of areas are clearly being improved and I’m excited to see how the final product develops! Right now building and furnishing a home has been a blast. Driving/boating mechanics are cool and nothing beats flying around in a sick jet pack. Swimming would be a great add so hope that comes soon. Going to try out the quests next and shoot some things up! Is the game complete yet? No. Is it worth trying out at the ground level? YES! Give it a try & I am excited to see where it goes.

Just tried out this game and it looks really promising! The driving mechanics are great and the Jetpack is really sick. I also got a pretty high score in the clear the building quest. Completed it in under a minute. There are some art and graphic glitches but I’m assuming those things are gonna be fixed soon. I’m looking forward to what they put in the game next. I’m probably gonna buy some land this weekend and check out those features too. Overall a great game to have fun and explore!
